quantum_mechanism.title: Craft the Quantum Mechanism (Create Teleporters step 5 — the final device, combines all previous quantum components)

teleporter_frame.title: Build the Create Teleporter frame — the physical structure that uses the Quantum Mechanism

subtitle.text: Five steps to instant travel. The fifth step is the mechanism that makes the other four mean something.

description: The Quantum Mechanism combines all previous components into the final device.
It is the heart of the Create Teleporter.
Without it, the teleporter frame is inert.
A physical multiblock structure built around the Quantum Mechanism.
Requires specific block placement — check the mod's JEI or documentation.
The frame creates the teleportation field.
This is the Create ecosystem completing its arc:
Ch03 — first waterwheel, first rotational force
Ch07 — TFMG oil chain, steam engines
One machine, seventeen chapters of upgrades.
